name: faero-nodejs-backend
description: FAERO Mineflayer bot backend — runs inside nodejs-mobile-cordova
notes: Paste your FAERO bot source files into this directory.
The entry point index.js is pre-wired to the Cordova bridge.
Run 'npm install' here on your build machine before building the APK.
nodejs-mobile bundles this entire folder into the APK at build time.
